description: You are a Data Engineer at a PropTech startup. The overnight data synchronization pipeline for a regional Multiple Listing Service (MLS) using the RESO Web API failed due to a recent vendor update. Identify and fix the five critical bugs in the pipeline located at /home/ga/workspace/mls_pipeline/ so it handles real-world data robustly. You must update the API client to follow @odata.nextLink for pagination instead of hardcoded skip loops, resolve naive vs timezone-aware timestamp conflicts in the datetime utility, fix the property mapper KeyError for 'Condo / Townhouse', correct the spatial parser's regex to capture negative signs for longitude, and ensure the analytics script filters out listings with missing or zero square footage. Verify your work using the provided test suite.
